title: hieracium incisum subsp. senile
intro: Hieracium incisum subsp. senile, also known as old man's hay or old man's feather, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Hieracium incisum subsp. senile can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
